area_anchor: BRIK Prime and Reception shared drafting architecture
current_truth: Email drafting is Gmail-shaped and Prime direct messaging is plain-text Firebase chat, so shared templates, agent drafting, and rich promotional Prime messages do not have a stable cross-channel contract yet.
next_scope_now: Document the shared architecture, then land Prime rich-message contracts and rendering foundations that future D1-canonical drafts and Reception review flows can build on.
adjacent_later: Add D1-canonical Prime chat and draft tables
Add Reception Prime review queue and takeover controls
Project Prime drafts and sent messages into Firebase from D1
evidence_refs: operator-stated: Prime and Reception need shared templates, agent drafting, rich support/promotional messages, and whole-hostel broadcast support
why: Shared templates and agent drafting need one drafting layer across email and Prime, while Prime also needs richer support/promotional payloads and broadcast audience support that the current plain direct-message model cannot represent.

intended_outcome.statement: Prime and Reception share a documented drafting architecture, and Prime gains rich-message contracts and rendering foundations for future D1-canonical draft/review flows.
